## Unreleased Changes

**15 changes** since v0.2.15

### Features

- feat: deploy modal with progress gauge and step-by-step status
- feat: sites page grid/list view toggle
- feat: reserved collection name guardrail + i18n preview redirects
- feat: add cmsdemo bilingual marketing site example
- feat: add F121 Snippet Embeds to feature roadmap
- feat: post-commit hook reminds to run /update-docs
- feat: /update-docs skill — sync docs.webhouse.app with CMS changes
- feat: Instant Content Deployment — skip full deploy when revalidation works

### Bug Fixes

- fix: handle GitHub Pages API 500 when Pages already enabled
- fix: ICD only skips full deploy when revalidation actually succeeds
- fix: F122 Beam includes chat history, memories, and user state
- fix: use "Get key" link pattern on pCloud access token field

### Other Changes

- docs: README.md + screenshots for all 13 example sites
- docs: add Instant Content Deployment (ICD) to AI guides
- refactor: F95 pCloud — switch from REST API to WebDAV (email+password)
